title: Gold Number 8 Shaped Large Foil Balloon (86cm) 1 Piece - Perfect for Birthday Parties and Special Events
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: NUMBER 8 SHAPED: Stand out with this stunning gold number 8-shaped large foil balloon, perfect for celebrating a birthday or commemorating a special milestone. Your event will certainly be remembered as a fabulous affair with this impressive centerpiece.

GORGEOUS GOLD DESIGN: Steal the spotlight with the eye-catching gold hue of this foil balloon, creating a vibrant and lively atmosphere in any celebration. This beautiful color adds a touch of charm and elegance to your event, delighting and captivating guests of all ages.

IMPRESSIVE SIZE: Impress your guests with the astonishing 86cm height of this gold number 8 balloon. This giant foil balloon makes a bold statement and serves as a fantastic backdrop for picture-perfect memories of your special day.

ONE-PIECE CONVENIENCE: Cut down on decorations fuss with this 1-piece, easy-to-inflate, large number 8 balloon. Save time and effort with this spectacular, easy-to-setup addition to your party décor that instantly uplifts the venue.

PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: Ideal for celebrating 4th birthdays, anniversaries, or enhancing creative theme parties and events, this silver number 4 shaped large foil balloon is a must-have item to create unforgettable moments.
description: From the manufacturer Giant Gold 34" Foil Number Balloons Make no mistake where the celebrations begin with these Giant Gold Foil Number Balloons!
